description: (_, RED, RED) is forbidden: a RED Tier 2 forces fail-fast (§ 5 R2), so the behavioral tier never runs and t3 cannot be RED. A conformant implementation MUST reject this triple rather than combine two RED signals.
why: § 6 R9 names (_, RED, RED) as unreachable; § 5 R2 fail-fast forces t3=SKIPPED after a RED production gate.
